data.content: Implemented buildTakePrompt and buildPollPrompt upgrades in beads-backend.ts. buildTakePrompt now claims queued+claimable beats via inline claim logic and returns rich skill prompts. Non-claimable beats get simple prompt. buildPollPrompt calls listReady, filters to isAgentClaimable, sorts by priority, claims top beat, returns rich prompt with claimedId. All 1904 tests pass. Lint and typecheck clean.
